meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-level case study for students building their first SaaS app.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template provides a pre-configured, modular architecture that isolates logic, preventing the 'spaghetti code' that makes debugging impossible. By combining this template with Claude Code, students can automate diagnostic logs and trace execution errors, transforming daunting runtime bugs into manageable, step-by-step resolution tasks for rapid development.
content.intro:
The screen is a static void of red error text. You’ve spent six hours chasing a ghost in your codebase, rewriting functions that weren't broken, and feeling the familiar sting of impostor syndrome. Every student developer hits this wall—the moment when the complexity of a project outpaces your ability to trace the logic.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started architecting it to be self-healing? The Antigravity project template isn't just a boilerplate; it's a structural safeguard designed to eliminate the most common debugging pitfalls before they start. By leveraging this framework alongside Claude Code, you move from 'debugging' to 'engineering,' turning your first project into a professional-grade portfolio piece.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure every file has a predictable home, drastically reducing path-based errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project structure using the Antigravity boilerplate, ensuring modular separation of concerns between API, UI, and logic layers.

steps.title: Automate Diagnostic Logging
steps.description: Inject structured logging into your template so you can see exactly where data flow breaks without guessing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject a global structured logger into the Antigravity middleware that captures input/output for every function call.

steps.title: Implement Defensive Error Boundaries
steps.description: Wrap your core logic in error boundaries to prevent app-wide crashes when a single component fails.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an error-handling wrapper for all asynchronous service calls within the Antigravity framework.

steps.title: Run AI-Assisted Trace Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse your logs and pinpoint the exact line of code causing the runtime exception.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the latest logs in the /logs directory and identify the root cause of the current runtime error.

steps.title: Execute Automated Hot-Fixing
steps.description: Apply the suggested fix directly to the codebase and verify the resolution with a test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the recommended fix for the identified error and run the test suite to ensure no regressions.

pro_tips: Always keep your logic in 'Services' and your UI in 'Views'; mixing them is the #1 cause of unfixable bugs.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests *before* you fix a bug; it forces you to define what 'working' looks like.
Limit your function scope: if a function is over 20 lines, it's too complex to debug effectively.
Leverage the Antigravity 'dry-run' mode to simulate data flow without hitting your live database.
Treat every error message as a specific instruction set; never copy-paste errors into search engines without first asking your AI context.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Architecture: https://github.com/saas-patterns
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, deploy it to a staging environment and run a smoke test to ensure the Antigravity structure holds under real-world traffic conditions.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the structure, and the guidance to stop debugging in the dark and start building with precision. Don't let your code hold you back from your potential. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
